MAIN CONTENT
SEBI has issued a circular regarding margin requirements for derivatives trading.

Circular No.: SEBI/HO/MRD/MRD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2024/15
Date: January 10, 2024

The circular specifies new margin computation methodology for equity and commodity derivatives.

FOOTER
Securities and Exchange Board of India
Plot No. C4-A, G Block, Bandra Kurla Complex
Bandra (East), Mumbai - 400051
